010nxqdfkkzqfdeclare p0 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p0; p1 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p1; p2 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p2; p3 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p3; p4 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p4; p5 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p5; p6 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p6; p7 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p7; p8 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p8; p9 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p9; p10 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p10; p11 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p11; p12 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p12; p13 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p13; p14 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p14; p15 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p15; p16 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p16; p17 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p17; p18 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p18; p19 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p19; p20 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p20; p21 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p21; p22 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p22; p23 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p23; p24 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p24; p25 VARCHAR2(4000) := :p25; rref VARCHAR2(4000); begin rref := dbms_report.build_report_reference_varg(p0, p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7, p8, p9, p10, p 11, p12, p13, p14, p15, p16, p17, p18, p19, p20, p21, p22, p23, p24, p25); :1 := dbms_report.get_report(rref); end;
03guhbfpak0w7select /*+ index(idl_ub1$ i_idl_ub11) */ piece#, length, piece from idl_ub1$ where obj#=:1 and part=:2 and version=:3 order by piece#
04kug40zbu4dmselect policy#, action# from aud_object_opt$ where object# = :1 and type = 2
06gapn9jpn8p1BEGIN :1 := orderentry.updateCustomerDetails(:2, :3, :4, :5, :6, :7, :8); END;
0m78skf1mudnbselect audit$, properties from type_misc$ where obj#=:1
0y1prvxqc2ra9SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY_ID, WEIGHT_CLASS, WARRANTY_PERIOD, SUPPLIER_ID, PRODUCT_STATUS, LIST_PRICE, MIN_PRICE, CATALOG_URL, QUANTITY_ON_HAND FROM PRODUCTS, INVENTORIES WHERE PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID = :B2 AND INVENTORIES.PRODUCT_ID = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_ID AND ROWNUM < :B1
0yn07bvqs30qjselect pctfree_stg, pctused_stg, size_stg, initial_stg, next_stg, minext_stg, maxext_stg, maxsiz_stg, lobret_stg, mintim_stg, pctinc_stg, initra_stg, maxtra_stg, optimal_stg, maxins_stg, frlins_stg, flags_stg, bfp_stg, enc_stg, cmpflag_stg, cmplvl_stg, imcflag_stg, ccflag_stg, flags2_stg from deferred_stg$ where obj# =:1
121ffmrc95v7gselect i.obj#, i.ts#, i.file#, i.block#, i.intcols, i.type#, i.flags, i.property, i.pctfree$, i.initrans, i.maxtrans, i.blevel, i.leafcnt, i.distkey, i.lblkkey, i.dblkkey, i.clufac, i.cols, i.analyzetime, i.samplesize, i.dataobj#, nvl(i.degree, 1), nvl(i.instances, 1), i.rowcnt, mod(i.pctthres$, 256), i.indmethod#, i.trunccnt, nvl(c.unicols, 0), nvl(c.deferrable#+c.valid#, 0), nvl(i.spare1, i.intcols), i.spare4, i.spare2, i.spare6, decode(i.pctthres$, null, null, mod(trunc(i.pctthres$/256), 256)), nvl(i.evaledition#, 1), nvl(i.unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(i.unusablebeginning#, 0), ist.cachedblk, ist.cachehit, ist.logicalread from ind$ i, ind_stats$ ist, (select enabled, min(intcols) unicols, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 1))) deferrable#, min(to_number(bitand(defer, 4))) valid# from cdef$ where obj#=:1 and enabled > 1 group by enabled) c where i.obj# =c.enabled(+) and i.obj# = ist.obj#(+) and i.bo#=:1 order by i.obj#
1b3utaf6tfhfyUPDATE ORDER_ITEMS SET QUANTITY = QUANTITY + 1 WHERE ORDER_ITEMS.ORDER_ID = :B2 AND ORDER_ITEMS.LINE_ITEM_ID = :B1
1fnbpxjdjzn4vBEGIN orderentry.setPLSQLCOMMIT(:1); END;
1kj22kmw7u7g5select spare3 from sensitive_fixed$ where name=:1 and flag=:2
1qf3b7a46jm3uSELECT ORDER_ID, LINE_ITEM_ID, PRODUCT_ID, UNIT_PRICE, QUANTITY, DISPATCH_DATE, RETURN_DATE, GIFT_WRAP, CONDITION, SUPPLIER_ID, ESTIMATED_DELIVERY FROM ORDER_ITEMS WHERE ORDER_ID = :B2 AND ROWNUM < :B1
1qu7kh9w241krSELECT /*CROSSCON*/ /* */ /*"AWR_ROOT_SERVICE_NAME"*/ /* NONE */ * FROM NO_OBJECT_LINK("SYS"."AWR_ROOT_SERVICE_NAME")
1xmqt5f1jvgwjWITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003631', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003631', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session , floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BAC KGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_i d || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414003631', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004131', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (2.73619047619047619047619047619047619048)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m ", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , ma p_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FR OM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_ number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBU TES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_s ql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common, 'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, db a_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, se rvice_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, s ql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(2.73619047619047619047619047619047619048, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_ xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
21ss57x3bykp3BEGIN :1 := orderentry.newcustomer(:2, :3, :4, :5, :6, :7, :8, :9, :10); END;
2d51zcr4wu8gcWITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003616', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003616', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session , floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BAC KGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_i d || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414003616', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004116', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (2.52761904761904761904761904761904761905)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m ", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , ma p_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FR OM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_ number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBU TES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_s ql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common, 'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, db a_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, se rvice_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, s ql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(2.52761904761904761904761904761904761905, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_ xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
2v6cmjkuppv0wWITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session, floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id , 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(client_info, 'NULL') as client_info, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J__ _)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as p l_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sq l_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM SYS.V_$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= :begin_date AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < :end_date AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (:sample_ratio)) ) ) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_client_info as (SELECT client_info, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_info FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_info_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_info", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_info) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_info) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlel ement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", sys.sys_ixmlagg(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sq l_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", sys.sys_ixm lagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id F ROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash ORDER BY physical_session)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM (SELECT * FROM map_physical_session ORDER BY id)) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM ( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM SYS.V_$instance ) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 914873574 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM sys.v_$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "na me")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 914873574, 3345192309, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 914873574 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash )) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, sys.v_$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 914873574, 3345192309, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, CASE WHEN (u.common='YES' AND u.application='NO') THEN 'y' ELSE 'n' END as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT( "m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, client_info, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, service_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlel ement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_client_info.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' || map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t, ash.physical_session))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_client_info, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullph v, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.client_info = map_client_info.client_info AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_ opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(nvl(:sample_ratio, 1), 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , map_client_info_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.x ml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, map_client_info_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
3fw75k1snsddxINSERT INTO ORDERS ( ORDER_ID, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_MODE, CUSTOMER_ID, ORDER_STATUS, WAREHOUSE_ID, DELIVERY_TYPE, DELIVERY_ADDRESS_ID, COST_OF_DELIVERY, WAIT_TILL_ALL_AVAILABLE, CUSTOMER_CLASS, CARD_ID, INVOICE_ADDRESS_ID ) VALUES ( ORDERS_SEQ.NEXTVAL + :B8 , SYSTIMESTAMP , 'online', :B7 , 1, :B6 , 'Standard', :B1 , DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(:B5 , :B4 ), 'ship_asap', :B2 , :B3 , :B1 ) RETURNING ORDER_ID INTO :O0
3n4tadqgd9b9rBEGIN :1 := orderentry.neworder(:2, :3, :4); END;
3un99a0zwp4vdselect owner#, name, namespace, remoteowner, linkname, p_timestamp, p_obj#, nvl(property, 0), subname, type#, flags, d_attrs from dependency$ d, obj$ o where d_obj#=:1 and p_obj#=obj#(+) order by order#
41gy3d72db6k9WITH mem_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) * 10 as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session, floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(clien t_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(client_info, 'NULL') as client_info, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ', ' || decod e(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM SYS.V_$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= :begin_date AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < :end_date AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (:sample_ratio * 10)) ) ) , mem_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ instance_number as inst_id, MIN(sample_id) as min_sample_id FROM mem_source GROUP BY instance_number ) , disk_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT a.instance_number as inst_id FROM AWR_PDB_DATABASE_INSTANCE a WHERE a.dbid = :dbid ) , sample_id_bounds AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ d.inst_id, m.min_sample_id FROM disk_times d FULL OUTER JOIN mem_times m ON (d.inst_id = m.inst_id) ) , disk_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date)) as t, TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state , a.usecs_per_row/1000000 as sample_count, a.instance_number as instance_number, a.instance_number || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session, floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl( client_info, 'NULL') as client_info, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end ) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NUL L') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_cha r(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM AWR_PDB_ACTIVE_SESS_HISTORY a , sample_id_bounds WHERE a.dbid = :dbid AND a.snap_id >= :begin_snap AND a.snap_id <= :end_snap + 1 AND a.sample_time_utc >= :begin_timestamp AND a.sample_time_utc < :end_timestamp AND a.instance_number = sample_id_bounds.inst_id AND (sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id IS NULL OR sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id > a.sample_id) AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle' ) ) , unified_ash AS (SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM (SELECT * FROM mem_source UNION ALL SELECT * FROM disk_source)) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement(" action", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement( "client_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_client_info as (SELECT client_info, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_info FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_info_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_info", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_info) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_info) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement( "m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum a s id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", sys.sys_ixmlagg(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m" , xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_r ws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement( "m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash ORDER BY physical_session)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM (SELECT * FROM map_physical_session ORDER BY id)) , m ap_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM ( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM SYS.V_$instance ) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_PDB_database_instance WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("insta nce_number", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT consumer_group_id , max(CONSUMER_GROUP_NAME) as name FROM AWR_PDB_RSRC_CONSUMER_GROUP WHERE dbid = 3345192309 AND (consumer_group_id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) AND snap_id >= 302 AND snap_id <= 304 GROUP BY consumer_group_id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "consumer_group_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 3345192309, 3345192309, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_PDB_service_name WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as
