725m1k2nwmrj9WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003602', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003602', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session , floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BAC KGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_i d || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414003602', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004102', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (2.32857142857142857142857142857142857143)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m ", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , ma p_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FR OM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_ number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBU TES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_s ql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common, 'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, db a_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, se rvice_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, s ql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(2.32857142857142857142857142857142857143, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_ xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
76qcscs1p75v2INSERT ALL WHEN (:B32 = 1) THEN INTO WRI$_SQLSET_STATEMENTS (ID, CON_DBID, SQLSET_ID, SQL_ID, FORCE_MATCHING_SIGNATURE, PARSING_SCHEMA_NAME, MODULE, ACTION, COMMAND_TYPE) VALUES (:B17 , :B15 , :B31 , :B30 , :B29 , :B23 , :B28 , :B27 , :B26 ) WHEN (:B24 = 1) THEN INTO WRI$_SQLSET_PLANS (STMT_ID, PLAN_HASH_VALUE, CON_DBID, PARSING_SCHEMA_NAME, BIND_DATA, OPTIMIZER_ENV, PLAN_TIMESTAMP, BINDS_CAPTURED) VALUES (:B17 , :B16 , :B15 , :B23 , :B25 , :B22 , :B21 , :B20 ) WHEN (:B24 = 0) THEN INTO WRI$_SQLSET_PLANS (STMT_ID, PLAN_HASH_VALUE, CON_DBID, PARSING_SCHEMA_NAME, BIND_DATA, OPTIMIZER_ENV, PLAN_TIMESTAMP, BINDS_CAPTURED) VALUES (:B17 , :B16 , :B15 , :B23 , NULL, :B22 , :B21 , :B20 ) WHEN (1 = 1) THEN INTO WRI$_SQLSET_MASK (STMT_ID, PLAN_HASH_VALUE, CON_DBID, PRIORITY, OTHER) VALUES (:B17 , :B16 , :B15 , :B 19 , :B18 ) INTO WRI$_SQLSET_STATISTICS (STMT_ID, PLAN_HASH_VALUE, CON_DBID, ELAPSED_TIME, ELAPSED_TIME_DELTA, CPU_TIME, CPU_TIME_DELTA, BUFFER_GETS, BUFFER_GETS_DELTA, DISK_READS, DISK_READS_DELTA, DIRECT_WRITES, DIRECT_WRITES_DELTA, ROWS_PROCESSED, ROWS_PROCESSED_DELTA, FETCHES, FETCHES_DELTA, EXECUTIONS, EXECUTIONS_DELTA, END_OF_FETCH_COUNT, OPTIMIZER_COST, FIRST_LOAD_TIME, FIRST_LOAD_TIME_DELTA, STAT_PERIOD, ACTIVE_STAT_PERIOD, LAST_EXEC_START_TIME) VALUES (:B17 , :B16 , :B15 , :B14 , 0, :B13 , 0, :B12 , 0, :B11 , 0, :B10 , 0, :B9 , 0, :B8 , 0, :B7 , 0, :B6 , :B5 , :B4 , NULL, :B3 , :B2 , :B1 ) SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
7hk2m2702ua0gWITH NEED_TO_PROCESS AS (SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID FROM ORDERS WHERE ORDER_STATUS <= 4 AND WAREHOUSE_ID = :B1 AND ROWNUM < 10 ) SELECT O.ORDER_ID, OI.LINE_ITEM_ID, OI.PRODUCT_ID, OI.UNIT_PRICE, OI.QUANTITY, O.ORDER_MODE, O.ORDER_STATUS, O.ORDER_TOTAL, O.SALES_REP_ID, O.PROMOTION_ID, C.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUST_FIRST_NAME, C.CUST_LAST_NAME, C.CREDIT_LIMIT, C.CUST_EMAIL, O.ORDER_DATE FROM ORDERS O, NEED_TO_PROCESS NTP, CUSTOMERS C, ORDER_ITEMS OI WHERE NTP.ORDER_ID = O.ORDER_ID AND C.CUSTOMER_ID = O.CUSTOMER_ID AND OI.ORDER_ID (+) = O.ORDER_ID
7r7636982atn9UPDATE INVENTORIES SET QUANTITY_ON_HAND = QUANTITY_ON_HAND - :B1 WHERE PRODUCT_ID = :B3 AND WAREHOUSE_ID = :B2
7ws837zynp1zvSELECT CARD_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CARD_TYPE, CARD_NUMBER, EXPIRY_DATE, IS_VALID, SECURITY_CODE FROM CARD_DETAILS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = :B2 AND ROWNUM < :B1
7yhuvsmwggtqnBEGIN :1 := orderentry.browseproducts(:2, :3, :4); END;
8swypbbr0m372select order#, columns, types from access$ where d_obj#=:1
8tt8far209h4nBEGIN :1 := orderentry.processorders(:2, :3, :4); END;
8z3542ffmp562SELECT QUANTITY_ON_HAND FROM PRODUCT_INFORMATION P, INVENTORIES I WHERE I.PRODUCT_ID = :B2 AND I.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID AND I.WAREHOUSE_ID = :B1
8zz6y2yzdqjp0SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, CUST_FIRST_NAME, CUST_LAST_NAME, NLS_LANGUAGE, NLS_TERRITORY, CREDIT_LIMIT, CUST_EMAIL, ACCOUNT_MGR_ID, CUSTOMER_SINCE, CUSTOMER_CLASS, SUGGESTIONS, DOB, MAILSHOT, PARTNER_MAILSHOT, PREFERRED_ADDRESS, PREFERRED_CARD FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE LOWER(CUST_LAST_NAME) = LOWER(:B3 ) AND LOWER(CUST_FIRST_NAME) = LOWER(:B2 ) AND ROWNUM < :B1
973b3wnh8tpmtWITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session, floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_ id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(client_info, 'NULL') as client_info, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J ___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ', ' || decode( sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM SYS.V_$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= :begin_date AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < :end_date AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') ) ) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum a s id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_client_info as (SELECT client_info , rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_info FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_info_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_info", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_info) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_info) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid _xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", sys.sys_ixmlagg(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , ro wnum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i ")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", sys.s ys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash ORDER BY physical_session)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM (SELECT * FROM map_physical_session ORDER BY id)) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM ( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM SYS.V_$instance ) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 914873574 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM sys.v_$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 914873574, 3345192309, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max( service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 914873574 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, sys.v_$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 914873574, 3345192309, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, CASE WHEN (u.common='YES' AND u.application='NO') THEN 'y' ELSE 'n' END as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.u ser_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, client_info, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, service_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_client_info.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t, ash.physical_session))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_client_info, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.in stance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.client_info = map_client_info.client_info AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.s ql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(nvl(:sample_ratio, 1), 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , map_client_info_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, map_client_info_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
9t3n2wpr7my63INSERT INTO ADDRESSES ( ADDRESS_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, DATE_CREATED, HOUSE_NO_OR_NAME, STREET_NAME, TOWN, COUNTY, COUNTRY, POST_CODE, ZIP_CODE ) VALUES ( :B6 , :B5 , TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MI'), FLOOR(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(1, :B4 )), 'Street Name', :B3 , :B2 , :B1 , 'Postcode', NULL )
9tt2m0mpc2qqpselect /*+ index(idl_char$ i_idl_char1) */ piece#, length, piece from idl_char$ where obj#=:1 and part=:2 and version=:3 order by piece#
a3jpjzh7mtwwpselect /*+ index(idl_ub2$ i_idl_ub21) */ piece#, length, piece from idl_ub2$ where obj#=:1 and part=:2 and version=:3 order by piece#
a7q96p26uzq9aSELECT ADDRESS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
abudzy0rwahdg select call_ctr, rank, data_type, value from WRR_ROOT_REPLAY_DATA where dbid = 914873574 and rep_wl_id = 41 and file_id = :file_id and rank > :min_rank and rank <= :max_rank order by rank
acmvv4fhdc9zhselect obj#, type#, ctime, mtime, stime, status, dataobj#, flags, oid$, spare1, spare2, spare3, signature, spare7, spare8, spare9, nvl(dflcollid, 16382), creappid, creverid, modappid, modverid, crepatchid, modpatchid from obj$ where owner#=:1 and name=:2 and namespace=:3 and remoteowner is null and linkname is null and subname is null
ajjqqrmacwv34BEGIN :1 := orderentry.browseandupdateorders(:2, :3, :4); END;
ajyuz252n1fu6select name, intcol#, segcol#, type#, length, nvl(precision#, 0), decode(type#, 2, nvl(scale, -127/*MAXSB1MINAL*/), 178, scale, 179, scale, 180, scale, 181, scale, 182, scale, 183, scale, 231, scale, 119, nvl(scale, 0), 127, nvl(scale, 0), 0), null$, fixedstorage, nvl(deflength, 0), default$, rowid, col#, property, nvl(charsetid, 0), nvl(charsetform, 0), spare1, spare2, nvl(spare3, 0), nvl(evaledition#, 1), nvl(unusablebefore#, 0), nvl(unusablebeginning#, 0), case when (type# in (1, 8, 9, 96, 112)) then nvl(collid, 16382) else (case when (type# in (119)) then nvl(collid, 0) else 0 end ) end case, nvl(collintcol#, 0), nvl(acdrrescol#, 0), nvl(spare7, 0), nvl(spare9, 0), nvl(spare10, 0) from col$ where obj#=:1 order by intcol#
b2y7kj82f5yp4BEGIN sys.dbms_random.capture_on := TRUE; END;
b54yjt9sxbp7p select seq_name, seq_bnm, seq_bow, first_value, last_value, change, num_values, call_ctr, rank from WRR_ROOT_REPLAY_SEQ_DATA where file_id = :file_id and call_ctr > :call_ctr order by call_ctr, rank, seq_name, seq_bnm, seq_bow
bqp6pzzz9s6p3WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414004131', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414004131', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session, floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKG ROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414004131', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004201', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (4.07619047619047619047619047619047619048)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m ", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , ma p_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FR OM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_ number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBU TES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_s ql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common, 'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, db a_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, se rvice_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, s ql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(4.07619047619047619047619047619047619048, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_ xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata
bs7dsk6syb2v3WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414004201', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414004201', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ', ' || a.session_id || ', ' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id , nvl(action, 'NULL') as action, decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ', ' || blocking_session || ', ' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session , floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id, 0)/4294967296) as capture_id, nvl(client_id, 'NULL') as client_id, nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id, nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop, nvl(ecid, 'NULL') as ecid, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2, 22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event, a.is_captured as is_captured, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out, (case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BAC KGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background, a.is_replayed as is_replayed, nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine, machine || ', ' || port as machine_port, nvl(module, 'NULL') as module, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model, 8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) as object, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ', ' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql, decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ', ' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top, nvl(program, 'NULL') as program, decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process, a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type, nvl(force_matching_signature, 0) as sql_fms, nvl(top_level_sql_id, 'NULL') as sql_id_top, sql_opcode as sql_opcode, top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws, decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || sql_plan_hash_value || ', ' || sql_plan_line_id || ', ' || sql_plan_operation || ', ' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line, nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid, decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ', ' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv, decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_i d || ', ' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value, 0, to_char(null), sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id, -1) as user_id, (CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class, nvl(xid, '0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414004201', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004231', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id , 1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (4.04761904761904761904761904761904761905)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m ", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , ma p_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT( "machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FR OM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name), 15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_ number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#), 32, '0') || name), 33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'PDB', 'N', 'Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) , obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBU TES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name, '/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name, '/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, 1, instr(pl_sql, ', ')-1), '0')) , to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ', ')+1), '0')) , NULL , 'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%, %' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_s ql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413, 792328793, 'Y', 'Y', 'N', 'Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common, 'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, db a_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions", 'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count, physical_session, instance_number, action, blocking_session, capture_id, client_id, consumer_group_id, dbop, ecid, event, is_captured, is_filtered_out, is_nc_background, is_replayed, machine, machine_port, module, object, pl_sql, pl_sql_top, program, px_process, se rvice_hash, session_type, sql_fms, sql_id_top, sql_opcode, sql_opcode_top, sql_rws, sql_rws_line, sqlid, sqlid_fullphv, sqlid_phv, user_id, wait_class, xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, N, N, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, N, Y, N, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y, Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ', ' || ash.bucket_number || ', ' || ROUND(ash.sample_count, 2) || ', ' || map_physical_session.id || ', ' || map_instance_number.id || ', ' ||map_action.id|| ', ' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ', ' ||map_captureid.id|| ', ' ||map_client_id.id|| ', ' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ', ' ||map_dbop.id|| ', ' ||map_ecid.id|| ', ' ||map_event.id|| ', ' ||is_captured|| ', ' ||is_filtered_out|| ', ' ||is_nc_background|| ', ' ||is_replayed|| ', ' ||map_machine.id|| ', ' ||map_machine_port.id|| ', ' ||map_module.id|| ', ' ||map_object.id|| ', ' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_program.id|| ', ' ||px_process|| ', ' ||map_service.id|| ', ' ||session_type|| ', ' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ', ' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ', ' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ', ' ||map_sqlid.id|| ', ' ||map_fullphv.id|| ', ' ||map_phv.id|| ', ' ||map_user_id.id|| ', ' ||map_waitclass.id|| ', ' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number , map_action, map_blk_sess, map_captureid, map_client_id, map_consumer_id, map_dbop, map_ecid, map_event, map_machine, map_machine_port, map_module, map_object, map_plsqlid, map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid, map_program, map_service, map_sqlfms, map_sqlid map_top_sqlid, sql_opcode_map, s ql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode, map_sql_rws, map_sql_rws_line, map_sqlid, map_fullphv, map_phv, map_user_id, map_waitclass, map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id
